index.heading: Ambitecture
index.text:
Ambitecture is a platform for creating and managing spatial audio and lighting systems.
Developed by [Kobald](https://kobald.com).

For fixtures like DMX a matching [renderer](renderer) is required.

renderer.heading: Renderer
renderer.text: A renderer is a module that converts Ambitecture intents into physical output.

heightSlider.heading: Height Slider
heightSlider.text: The height slider is a control that allows you to adjust the height of the fixture.

connectIntent.heading: Connect intents
connectIntent.text: Tap an intent on the stage to connect it to this one. Tap empty space, or × here, to cancel.
